gates.title: Real OpenAI GPT Image 2 API acceptance
acceptanceCriteria: Model discovery confirms gpt-image-2 is available to the tested key.
Text-to-image generation succeeds with real OpenAI Image API output.
Reference-image editing succeeds with real OpenAI Image API output.
Mask-based inpaint succeeds with real OpenAI Image API output.
App history and download behavior are checked with the real task outputs.

evidence.environment: macOS 26.5.1 arm64; package version 0.2.2; OpenAI-compatible image aggregator endpoint (not the official OpenAI API); model gpt-image-2.

references.label: Real OpenAI GPT Image 2 external acceptance tracker

artifacts.description: Redacted-local generation, single-edit, multi-edit, and mask inpaint outputs from the real-api verifier (gpt-image-2). Git-ignored; not distributed.

evidence.summary: Re-verified for 0.2.2 against a cost-approved OpenAI-compatible image aggregator endpoint: gpt-image-2 model discovery, text-to-image generation, single and multi reference editing, and mask-based inpaint all succeeded. Edit and inpaint requests run non-streaming (the 0.2.1 fix) and no longer hit the non-SSE streaming error. The verifier accepts both b64_json and image-url responses.

gates.title: Real Gemini / Nano Banana 3 API acceptance
acceptanceCriteria: Model discovery confirms gemini-3.1-flash-image is available to the tested key.
Nano Banana 3 text-to-image generation succeeds with real Gemini output.
Reference-image editing succeeds with real Gemini output.
Guided-region editing succeeds and is not described as exact-mask inpainting.
App history, provider/model display, parameter restore, and download behavior are checked with the real task outputs.

evidence.environment: macOS 26.5.1 arm64; package version 0.2.2; OpenAI-compatible image aggregator endpoint (not the official Google Generative Language API); model gemini-3.1-flash-image; bearer auth mode.

references.label: Real Gemini / Nano Banana 3 external acceptance tracker

artifacts.description: Redacted-local Nano Banana 3 generation, reference-edit, and guided-region-edit outputs from the real-gemini-api verifier (gemini-3.1-flash-image). Git-ignored; not distributed.

evidence.summary: Re-verified for 0.2.2 against the same cost-approved OpenAI-compatible image aggregator endpoint (bearer auth): gemini-3.1-flash-image model discovery, Nano Banana 3 text-to-image generation, reference-image editing, and guided-region editing all succeeded. Guided-region editing is recorded as guided-region, not exact-mask inpainting. The aggregator exposes the Gemini image model over an OpenAI-compatible base URL rather than the native Google Generative Language API.

gates.title: Developer ID signed macOS release package
acceptanceCriteria: Developer ID signing is performed without exposing secret values.
macOS artifacts are built from the v0.2.4 application-code release commit.
codesign verification passes against the signed app extracted from the release ZIP artifact.
macOS release verification passes against the signed artifact.
Apple notarization status is tracked separately in the macos-notarized gate.

evidence.environment: macOS 26.5.1 arm64; package version 0.2.4; Developer ID Application: Xiamen Corgnitor Technology Co.,Ltd (RPX587R2R7); Apple notarization credentials unset.

references.label: Developer ID signed macOS distribution tracker

artifacts.description: Developer ID signed, unnotarized DMG uploaded to the v0.2.4 release. SHA256 4931076a2cd8d6d69c0afcdd7c17d20286d0bd1906fcde501be7bdfe9b1dad34; 103470128 bytes.
Developer ID signed, unnotarized ZIP uploaded to the v0.2.4 release and verified locally after download. SHA256 bc404095e9ca39dbd91b01009a3043fd336032d92333ff78e44c88352f03c008; 99182264 bytes.

evidence.summary: v0.2.4 macOS DMG and ZIP were rebuilt from application-code release commit 8c05309 and uploaded to the v0.2.4 release. GitHub records the DMG as SHA256 4931076a2cd8d6d69c0afcdd7c17d20286d0bd1906fcde501be7bdfe9b1dad34 with size 103470128 bytes and the ZIP as SHA256 bc404095e9ca39dbd91b01009a3043fd336032d92333ff78e44c88352f03c008 with size 99182264 bytes. The downloaded ZIP was extracted and codesign verified the app as Developer ID Application: Xiamen Corgnitor Technology Co.,Ltd (RPX587R2R7). spctl reports rejected, source=Unnotarized Developer ID, so the asset is signed but not Apple-notarized.

gates.title: Apple notarized macOS release package
acceptanceCriteria: Apple notarization credentials are available without exposing secret values.
macOS artifacts are submitted to Apple notary service successfully.
Notarization is stapled to the distributed DMG or app artifact.
spctl verification reports an accepted notarized Developer ID source.

evidence.environment: macOS 26.5.1 arm64; package version 0.2.4; Apple notarization credentials unset.

artifacts.description: Developer ID signed DMG uploaded to the v0.2.4 release, but not Apple-notarized.
Developer ID signed ZIP uploaded to the v0.2.4 release, but not Apple-notarized.

evidence.summary: Apple notarization has not been completed for v0.2.4 because APPLE_ID, APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD, and APPLE_TEAM_ID were not configured in the release environment. The downloaded app verifies as Developer ID signed, while spctl reports rejected, source=Unnotarized Developer ID. This gate is separate from macos-signed so signed artifacts are not misreported as notarized.

gates.title: Native Windows release package validation
acceptanceCriteria: Windows package verifier runs in full native install mode.
NSIS silent install, installed app launch, main-window detection, and silent uninstall pass.
Packaged app can configure mock OpenAI and Gemini endpoints.
Download and open-folder behavior are checked on native Windows.

evidence.environment: GitHub Actions Windows runner plus prior Native Windows 11 Pro 10.0.26100 x64 shell evidence; package version 0.2.4; release asset Image2Tools-Setup.exe.
commands: GitHub Actions CI run 28464934988 / Windows package job 84363052155: package Windows app and verify Windows package in full-install mode.
GitHub Actions Release Windows run 28464953780 / job 84362218974: package Windows app, run package-smoke verification, and publish GitHub Release asset.

Prior native Windows packaged-app bridge acceptance remains applicable for unchanged download/open-folder IPC: configure loopback mock OpenAI and Gemini endpoints, generate managed outputs, invoke downloadAsset through the native Save dialog, and invoke openAssetFolder with Explorer directory verification.

artifacts.description: 0.2.4 CI run with successful Windows full-install package verification.
0.2.4 Windows release workflow that published the GitHub Release installer asset.
Prior native Windows packaged-app download and open-folder acceptance evidence for unchanged platform IPC behavior.

evidence.summary: 0.2.4 Windows packaging passed on GitHub Actions: CI run 28464934988 completed the Windows package job 84363052155, including full-install verification, and Release Windows run 28464953780 published the installer after package-smoke verification. The uploaded v0.2.4 installer was downloaded and verified as SHA256 26ace9c524736036806a52059e5bed649faddecb0284b2c348c68d57ef51e5a5 with size 98680455 bytes. Native download/open-folder behavior remains covered by the prior Windows native evidence because 0.2.4 only changes saved configuration UI, Gemini imageConfig sizing, and Windows workflow packaging metadata.

gates.title: Native Linux desktop AppImage validation
acceptanceCriteria: Linux release verifier runs on a native desktop shell.
Direct AppImage execution is mandatory with IMAGE2TOOLS_LINUX_REQUIRE_DIRECT_APPIMAGE=1.
Packaged app can configure mock OpenAI and Gemini endpoints.
Download and open-folder behavior are checked on native Linux.

evidence.environment: Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS (Noble Numbat) on WSL2, kernel 6.6.87.2-microsoft-standard-WSL2, x86_64; package version 0.2.0; artifact release/Image2Tools-0.2.0-linux-x86_64.AppImage.

references.label: Native Linux desktop AppImage validation tracker

artifacts.description: Linux native release verification evidence including verifier result and download/open-folder platform rationale.

evidence.summary: Linux native release verification passed: ELF assertions, unpacked app Xvfb launch, direct AppImage execution (FUSE mandatory), and extracted AppImage launch all stable for 15s. Download/open-folder relies on shared Electron IPC verified on Windows; native dialog cannot be exercised headlessly.

gates.title: Formal update manifest distribution assets
acceptanceCriteria: Distribution artifacts are uploaded to a public HTTPS release URL.
docs/updates/latest.json contains matching asset URL, fileName, sha256, and sizeBytes metadata.
Manifest asset metadata is generated from the exact signed or platform-validated artifact.
The app update downloader verifies downloaded asset size and SHA-256 before opening it.

evidence.environment: macOS 26.5.1 arm64 local shell plus GitHub Actions Windows runner; package version 0.2.4; darwin/arm64 DMG and win32/x64 installer published to the v0.2.4 GitHub release.

references.label: Formal update manifest distribution asset tracker

artifacts.description: Update manifest with darwin/arm64 DMG and win32/x64 installer asset URLs, SHA256, and sizeBytes for v0.2.4.

evidence.summary: Update manifest assets populated for v0.2.4 from the current release artifacts. Darwin DMG: SHA256 4931076a2cd8d6d69c0afcdd7c17d20286d0bd1906fcde501be7bdfe9b1dad34, 103470128 bytes. Windows installer: SHA256 26ace9c524736036806a52059e5bed649faddecb0284b2c348c68d57ef51e5a5, 98680455 bytes. Both entries point at HTTPS GitHub release download URLs and the app updater verifies downloaded size and SHA-256 before opening.
